narrative:
Vernon Township has 2,060 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.3 percentage points.
